hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: How we protect your personal data — OnLaw Office, Law Firm of Av. Orjon Nallbati

privacyTab.introText: This privacy policy explains how OnLaw Office collects, uses and protects your personal data when you visit our website onlawoffice.com or contact us through it, in compliance with Law No. 124/2024 "On the protection of personal data".

controller.title: Who are we? (Data Controller)
controller.text: The controller of personal data is:
controller.contactNote: For any questions regarding the processing of your personal data, you may contact us at the email address above.

dataCollected.title: What data do we collect?
dataCollected.intro: When you use our website, we may collect the following categories of data:
dataCollected.contactFormTitle: a) Data from the contact form:
dataCollected.noSensitive: We do not collect sensitive data (such as health, religious, or biometric data) through our website.

purpose.title: Why do we process data and on what legal basis?
purpose.intro: Your data is processed for the following purposes:

contactResponse.title: Responding to your request (Contact form)
contactResponse.text: Legal basis: Pre-contractual measures at your request, or your consent (Article 7, letters "b" and "a", Law 124/2024).

technicalFunction.title: Technical operation of the website
technicalFunction.text: Legal basis: Legitimate interest of the controller to ensure the technical operation of the website (Article 7, letter "dh", Law 124/2024).

legalObligation.title: Fulfilment of legal obligations
legalObligation.text: Legal basis: Legal obligation of the controller (Article 7, letter "c", Law 124/2024), such as document retention under fiscal or archival legislation.

retention.title: How long do we keep data?
retention.intro: We apply the principle of storage limitation pursuant to Article 6, paragraph 1, letter "dh" of Law 124/2024:

items.label: Contact data:
items.text: Retained until the end of communication with you and no longer than 12 months from the last contact, unless a contractual relationship is established.

items.label: Technical data (logs):
items.text: Retained for up to 90 days, solely for technical security purposes.

items.label: Legal/contractual documentation:
items.text: Retained according to applicable legal deadlines (up to 10 years under fiscal legislation).

retention.afterExpiry: After the expiry of the retention period, data is deleted or anonymised.

sharing.title: With whom do we share data?
sharing.intro: Your personal data is not sold, traded or shared with third parties for marketing purposes.
sharing.availableTo: They may only be made available to:

items.label: Technical service providers
items.text: (hosting, email) — who act as data processors under our instructions and with appropriate contractual safeguards;

items.label: Public authorities
items.text: — only when required by law or court order.

sharing.formNote: The contact form operates through an email delivery service. Data submitted through the form is sent directly to our professional email and is not stored in external databases.

transfers.title: Is data transferred outside Albania?
transfers.text1: As a rule, your data is processed within the territory of the Republic of Albania or in countries that provide an adequate level of protection.
transfers.text2: If, for technical reasons (such as email service infrastructure), data is transferred to another country, we ensure that the transfer is supported by appropriate safeguards under Part II, Chapter V (Articles 37-44) of Law 124/2024, including standard contractual clauses or adequacy decisions.

rights.title: What are your rights?
rights.intro: Under Articles 13-20 of Law 124/2024, you have the following rights:

items.label: Right to information
items.text: (Article 13) — to be informed about data processing

items.label: Right of access
items.text: (Article 14) — to obtain a copy of your data

items.label: Right to portability
items.text: (Article 18) — to receive your data in electronic format

items.label: Right to withdraw consent
items.text: — at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing

rights.exerciseText: Send your request by email to {email}. We will respond within 30 days.

complaint.title: Right to complain to the Commissioner
complaint.intro: If you consider that your personal data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to file a complaint with:
complaint.boxTitle: Commissioner for the Right to Information and Personal Data Protection
complaint.legalRemedy: Furthermore, under Article 88 of Law 124/2024, you have the right to an effective legal remedy before the competent court.

automated.title: Are automated decisions made?
automated.text: No. OnLaw Office does not use any automated decision-making system or profiling under Article 20 of Law 124/2024 in relation to website visitors or clients.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.text: This policy may be updated from time to time to reflect legal changes or changes in our practice. The updated version will be published on this page with the date of update. We encourage you to review it periodically.

cookieTab.introText: This policy explains how the website onlawoffice.com uses cookies — small text files stored on your device when you visit our website.

whatAreCookies.title: What are cookies?
whatAreCookies.text1: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device (computer, phone, tablet). They help the website function properly, save your preferences and provide a better browsing experience.
whatAreCookies.text2: Cookies do not contain viruses and cannot access other information on your device.

whichCookies.title: Which cookies do we use?
whichCookies.intro: The website onlawoffice.com uses only technical (essential) cookies for the website to function. We do not use analytics, marketing or profiling cookies.
whichCookies.noAnalyticsText: We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel or any other tracking tool. Your browsing on our website is not tracked for profiling or advertising purposes.

legalBasis.title: Legal basis for cookies
legalBasis.text1: Technical (essential) cookies do not require your consent, as they are necessary for the basic functioning of the website.
legalBasis.text2: Legal basis: Legitimate interest of the controller (Article 7, letter "dh", Law 124/2024) to ensure the technical operation and security of the website.
legalBasis.text3: If in the future we decide to use analytics or marketing cookies, we will update this policy and request your explicit consent before activating them.

manageCookies.title: How to manage cookies?
manageCookies.intro: You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings:
manageCookies.warning: Warning: Disabling technical cookies may affect the website's functionality, such as the ability to use the contact form.

contactFooter.title: Questions about your data?
contactFooter.text: Contact us for any matter related to privacy and personal data protection.
